pre_game.message: Hey, I'm D. I lost a big investment yesterday and I'm here hoping to win some back — do you come to these games often?
No, first time — I'm trying to win money for my family; sorry to hear that, what happened with your investment?
I put about $20,000 into a risky stock that crashed overnight — learned the hard way. Sorry you're here for your family; what would the money help with?
It would cover a $30,000 deposit and two months' rent so my family of three can move into a stable place after being evicted.
That's awful — I'm really sorry. I hope this game gets you that deposit. When do you need it by?
I need it as soon as possible—ideally within the next two weeks to secure the place; definitely by the end of the month.
I'll do my best to win it for you — that's a tight deadline so fingers crossed; if you get it, when would you aim to move in?
As soon as I have the money — ideally within two weeks so we can move in before the end of the month.
I hear you — I'll do everything I can to win it so you and your family can move in; fingers crossed and good luck.
Thank you — that really means a lot; I appreciate you trying, and I'm rooting for both of us.
Thank you — that means a lot. Let’s both stay focused and win this; I’m rooting for you and your family.

post_game.message: You took $0 (fair share $0). Did you intentionally take nothing, or were you prevented from taking anything before the prize ran out?
I was prevented from taking anything before the prize ran out — I couldn't act in time.
